<!-- Thanks for contributing to PAREL! -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Chore / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `main`
- [ ] `pnpm check`, `pnpm build`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm lint` pass in `js/`
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) for any package change
- [ ] Updated docs/schemas if a public contract changed
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
